reviews.comment:
Estuve en febrero de 2020,una decadencia total,no tenían infinia diésel,no funcionaba el aire y los baños tenían materia fecal hasta en la pared

(Translated by Google)
I was there in February 2020, it was a total decay, they had no diesel fuel, the air conditioning didn't work and the bathrooms had fecal matter even on the wall.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2NTVxRjZnRRAB
